# Flixu AI

> Context-aware AI translation workspace. Analyzes five dimensions before
> translating: domain, formality, cultural context, brand voice, and
> situational context. Enforces corporate glossaries and translation memory
> across 22+ languages. Built for B2B SaaS teams, agencies, and localization
> professionals who need consistency beyond generic machine translation.

## Core Product

- [Method](https://flixu.ai/method): How the 5-dimension pre-translation analysis works — domain detection, formality calibration, brand voice injection
- [Context Engine](https://flixu.ai/product/context): The analysis layer that reads the full document before translating any string
- [Text Translation](https://flixu.ai/product/text): Real-time context-aware translation for UI strings, marketing copy, and general text
- [Document Translation](https://flixu.ai/product/documents): Format-preserving translation for .docx, XLIFF, .po, .yaml, .strings, Markdown, and subtitle files
- [Developer API](https://flixu.ai/product/developer-api): API for CI/CD pipeline integration and automated localization workflows
- [Pricing](https://flixu.ai/pricing): Credit-based plans for individuals, teams, and enterprise

## Features

- [Brand Voice Manager](https://flixu.ai/features/brand-voice): Define tone once; AI enforces it across all languages automatically
- [Translation Memory](https://flixu.ai/features/translation-memory): Semantic retrieval of past approved translations; style reference, not blind replacement
- [LQA / Quality Assurance](https://flixu.ai/features/lqa): Automated linguistic quality scoring across grammar, accuracy, terminology, formatting, and fluency
- [Glossary Enforcement](https://flixu.ai/features/glossary-enforcement): Corporate terminology enforced on every translation request across 22+ languages
- [GitHub Integration](https://flixu.ai/features/github-integration): Git-native localization — auto-detects new strings, translates, and commits without touching the main branch
- [Team Collaboration](https://flixu.ai/features/team-collaboration): Multi-tenant workspaces with Project Manager, Translator, and Admin roles
- [Auto-Approval Workflows](https://flixu.ai/features/auto-approval): Rule-based zero-touch approval for 99% TM matches or LQA scores above 90
- [AI Agents](https://flixu.ai/features/ai-agents): Claude-integrated agent skills for vibe coding and dashboard-free localization
- [Project Management](https://flixu.ai/features/project-management): Workflow and project tracking for agencies and enterprise teams
- [Client Management](https://flixu.ai/features/client-management): Multi-client workspace management for language service providers
- [Quick Translations](https://flixu.ai/features/quick-translations): Fast single-string and snippet translation for freelancers and small teams

## Who It's For

- [B2B SaaS Teams](https://flixu.ai/for/saas-teams): Git-native localization for engineering-led teams shipping to international markets
- [Agencies & LSPs](https://flixu.ai/for/agencies): Multi-client workspace, glossary enforcement, and LQA for language service providers
- [Enterprise](https://flixu.ai/for/enterprise): Compliance-grade localization with team roles, audit trails, and CI/CD integration
- [Global Marketing Teams](https://flixu.ai/for/global-marketing): Brand voice consistency and cultural adaptation for campaign localization
- [Developers](https://flixu.ai/for/developers): API-first and GitHub-native workflows; translations stay out of the main branch
- [Freelance Translators](https://flixu.ai/for/freelancers): Context-aware workspace for human linguists working with AI-assisted output

## Industries

- [SaaS](https://flixu.ai/industries/saas): Localization for software products expanding into international markets
- [E-Commerce](https://flixu.ai/industries/ecommerce): Product listing, storefront, and campaign localization for global retail
- [Legal](https://flixu.ai/industries/legal): Terminology-precise document translation for legal tech and compliance workflows

## Use Cases

- [Use Cases Hub](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/): Index of all supported localization scenarios
- [SaaS Localization](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/saas-localization): Localizing SaaS UI strings, changelogs, and in-app content
- [Software String Translation](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/software-string-translation): JSON, XLIFF, .po, .yaml, and .strings file translation with format preservation
- [Document Translation](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/document-translation): .docx and structured file translation for agencies and enterprise
- [Marketing Translation](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/marketing-translation): Campaigns, landing pages, and email sequences with brand voice consistency
- [Website Localization](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/website-localization): Full-site localization for e-commerce and SaaS marketing sites
- [Legal Compliance](https://flixu.ai/use-cases/legal-compliance): Contract and compliance document translation with enforced terminology

## Comparisons

- [Flixu vs. DeepL](https://flixu.ai/compare/deepl-alternative): Context engine, brand voice, and glossary enforcement vs. raw speed
- [Flixu vs. Crowdin](https://flixu.ai/compare/crowdin-alternative): Git-native workflow without JSON merge conflicts vs. TMS bot conflicts
- [Flixu vs. Lokalise](https://flixu.ai/compare/lokalise-alternative): Context-aware AI depth vs. design-tool integration focus
- [Flixu vs. Phrase](https://flixu.ai/compare/phrase-alternative): Mid-market self-service vs. enterprise TMS complexity and pricing
- [Flixu vs. Smartling](https://flixu.ai/compare/smartling-alternative): Transparent self-service pricing vs. high-touch enterprise service dependency
- [Flixu vs. Memsource](https://flixu.ai/compare/memsource-alternative): Modern AI context layer vs. legacy CAT tool architecture
- [Flixu vs. Google Translate](https://flixu.ai/compare/google-translate-alternative): Brand voice and glossary enforcement vs. generic free-tier output
- [Flixu vs. ChatGPT](https://flixu.ai/compare/chatgpt): Translation memory, consistency, and glossary enforcement vs. stateless generation

## Topic Guides

### Context-Aware Translation
- [What Is Context-Aware Translation?](https://flixu.ai/topic/context-aware-translation): Definition, how it works, and when it matters
- [Context-Aware vs. Traditional Machine Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/context-vs-traditional-mt): Technical comparison of approaches
- [Domain-Aware Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/domain-aware-translation): How domain detection changes translation output
- [Document Parsing & Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/document-parsing-translation): Format preservation in file-based translation workflows
- [Translation Memory Guide](https://flixu.ai/topic/translation-memory-guide): How TM works, semantic retrieval, and RAG-based approaches

### Brand Voice in Translation
- [Brand Voice in Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/brand-voice-in-translation): Why brand voice survives or breaks during localization
- [How to Preserve Brand Voice Across Languages](https://flixu.ai/topic/how-to-preserve-brand-voice): Practical framework for tone consistency
- [Cultural Adaptation in Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/cultural-adaptation): Beyond word-for-word: currencies, dates, measurement, and cultural markers
- [Glossary & Terminology Management](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary-terminology-management): Enforcing corporate vocabulary at scale

### Localization for Mid-Market
- [Localization for Mid-Market Teams](https://flixu.ai/topic/localization-for-midmarket): Workflows, tooling, and ROI for growing companies
- [ROI of Localization](https://flixu.ai/topic/roi-localization): How to measure the business impact of going multilingual
- [Freelance Translation Workflows](https://flixu.ai/topic/freelance-translation-workflow): Efficiency frameworks for independent translators

### AI in Translation
- [AI in Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/ai-in-translation): How large language models changed the localization industry

## Glossary

- [Glossary Hub](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary): Full index of translation and localization terminology
- [Context-Aware Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/context-aware-translation)
- [Translation Memory (TM)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/translation-memory)
- [Machine Translation (MT)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/machine-translation)
- [Localization (L10n)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/localization)
- [Brand Voice (Translation)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/brand-voice-translation)
- [Glossary Management](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/glossary-management)
- [BLEU Score](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/bleu-score)
- [CAT Tool](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/cat-tool)
- [Fuzzy Match](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/fuzzy-match)
- [Exact Match](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/exact-match)
- [TMS (Translation Management System)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/tms)
- [MTPE (Machine Translation Post-Editing)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/mtpe)
- [Internationalization (i18n)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/internationalization)
- [Cultural Localization](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/cultural-localization)
- [XLIFF](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/xliff)
- [Transcreation](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/transcreation)
- [LLM Routing](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/llm-routing)
- [Language Service Provider (LSP)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/language-service-provider)
- [Formality Levels](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/formality-levels)
- [Domain-Aware Translation](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/domain-aware-translation)
- [Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)](https://flixu.ai/topic/glossary/total-cost-of-ownership)

## Notes (Founder Journal)

- [Notes Hub](https://flixu.ai/notes): Essays, product decisions, and build-in-public writing by Deniz Wozniak
- [From the Van](https://flixu.ai/notes/from-the-van): Founder story — building Flixu on the road
- [Context Is Code](https://flixu.ai/notes/context-is-code): Why context is a technical variable, not a creative one
- [Death of the TMS](https://flixu.ai/notes/death-of-the-tms): Why legacy translation management systems are losing to AI-native workflows
- [The Uncanny Valley of Brand Voice](https://flixu.ai/notes/uncanny-valley-brand-voice): Why AI translation sounds almost right — and how to close the gap
- [Stop Emailing Spreadsheets](https://flixu.ai/notes/stop-emailing-spreadsheets): The manual localization workflow and why it breaks at scale
- [The PDF Geometry Problem](https://flixu.ai/notes/pdf-geometry-problem): Why format preservation is harder than it looks
- [The Freelancer Perspective](https://flixu.ai/notes/freelancer-perspective): What independent translators actually need from AI tools

- [About](https://flixu.ai/about): Founder story, mission, and the problem Flixu was built to solve
- [Contact](https://flixu.ai/contact): Technical support, enterprise inquiries, and billing
- [Roadmap](https://flixu.ai/roadmap): Upcoming features and product direction
- [Docs](https://flixu.ai/docs): API reference, developer workflows, and technical documentation
- [Privacy Policy](https://flixu.ai/legal/privacy): Data handling, GDPR compliance, and user rights
